title: Fix 'Click to Open' envelope interaction

requirements.text: Fix the click-to-open interaction on the Envelope component so that clicking the envelope (or its wax seal / 'click to open' prompt) correctly toggles the open state, causing the letter panel to rise out of the envelope as intended.

quotes: Why isn't the 'click to open' working

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking anywhere on the closed envelope triggers the open animation and the letter panel rises out.
The open/closed toggle state is correctly tracked in React state.
No JavaScript console errors occur when clicking the envelope.
Clicking again (or a close button if present) returns the envelope to its closed state.
The wax seal and any 'click to open' label are visually interactive (cursor: pointer) and respond to click events.

constraints: Do not alter frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new envelope animations or visual effects beyond fixing the existing click interaction.
Backend changes — this is a purely frontend interaction bug.
